resources.string: Double tap the wallpaper to lock
Lets you lock the screen with a double tap on the home screen. The app does not read, listen to or collect any data from the device.
Lock your screen with a double tap on the home screen
Set it as your live wallpaper
To lock your screen with a double tap, the app needs the Accessibility permission. Here\'s what that means.
The app uses Android\'s Accessibility service. It\'s the only way for an app like this to lock your screen.
When you double-tap your home screen, the app tells Android to lock the device. That\'s the whole feature.
3. What the app will NOT do
It will not read what\'s on your screen, track your taps, look at your other apps, or send anything over the internet. The app has no internet permission at all.
You can turn this off whenever you want, in Settings > Accessibility.
The full source code is public on GitHub. You can read it and confirm everything above before granting the permission.
